rationale: Educ. Code §12.011 governs the effect of adopting a home-rule school district charter on district boundaries and pre-existing taxes/bonds. It does not address or constrain the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: The adoption of a home-rule school district charter by a school district does not affect:
_note: Rule text concerns home-rule charter status only; no provision touches homestead exemption amounts.
